Q3
a) In perceptron we can only apply regression to
clearly separated feature data
set. But when the
set can't be linearly separate we have to
find some other way to
over come this limitation.
for applying regression model on non-linearly classifie
we use gradient descent optimization algorithm
Gradient descent optimization algorithm helps in reducing
the error and optimizing the model which is continuously
distributed.
Through partial differentiation of the change in Error
weight we reach to the Lowest error point in the
data set.

- Derivation of gradient descent optimization algorithm
